title: Select All for Multiple Status Option Deletion

posts.author: ron.victor (Ronald G. Victor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

For the status field, my default list of options pop up every time. I do not necessarily need those options when using that field type so it becomes a pain to either replace or delete each one.

What are you trying to achieve

Can we have either a on/off switch to list the default options or not?

Even better, can you enable creating several versions options (eg colors, sizes, states, countries) that we can switch between?

Even better than that, have yall though about generating default lists EVERYONE uses ALL THE TIME on forms (eg States, Countries)?

I’d love you even more if you do
